meta.homeDescription: Chattr is a secure messenger for iOS. No data collection, no tracking. Just conversation.

hero.eyebrow: Private messenger · iOS, Android, Mac, Windows
hero.tagline: Chattr is a messenger built for people who value their privacy. No ads, no selling your data, no trackers. Just dependable conversation.

preview.name: Anna
preview.msg1: Hey! Is it safe to talk here?
preview.msg3: And they don't sell our data?

features.title: A messenger built
features.card1Desc: Your messages are encrypted in transit and on the server. We don't use them for ads or hand them to third parties.
features.card2Desc: A reliable connection even where other messengers are blocked. Open it and start talking.
features.card3Desc: A clean interface with nothing extra. Instant delivery, minimal resources.

cta.title: Start speaking freely.
cta.desc: Download Chattr — setup takes less than a minute.

footer.tagline: A messenger without blocks. Works without a VPN.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for the Chattr app for iOS
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: Chattr ("we", "our", or "the app") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect and how we handle it when you use our app.
privacy.collectionText: When you register, we collect account information — your email address and phone number. Your messages, media, and attachments are transmitted to and stored on our servers.
privacy.storageText: Your messages and media are stored on our servers in encrypted form, as well as locally on your device. Server-side storage is needed to deliver messages, sync across your devices, and keep your conversation history.
privacy.securityText: The content of your messages and media is stored in encrypted form, and we do not have access to it. We do not sell your data or share it with third parties, except where required by law.
privacy.retentionText: We retain your data for as long as it is needed to provide the service. You can delete your account and its associated data at any time — see the "Data Deletion" page for details.
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

privacyConnect.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for the Chattr Connect VPN app
privacyConnect.title: Chattr Connect Privacy Policy
privacyConnect.introText: Chattr Connect is a VPN service built to protect your privacy and security online. This Privacy Policy explains what information we do and do not collect when you use the Chattr Connect app.
privacyConnect.noLogsText: We operate under a strict no-logs policy. We do not monitor, record, or store information about your online activity: the sites you visit, your DNS queries, the content or destination of your traffic, or the IP addresses assigned to you. Because we keep no such logs, we have no activity data to hand over to any third party.
privacyConnect.collectionText: To provide the service, we collect a minimal amount of data: an email address or account identifier for registration, your subscription status, and anonymized diagnostic data about app performance (such as whether a connection succeeded) needed to keep the service running.
privacyConnect.paymentText: Subscription payments are processed by third-party payment providers and app stores (App Store, Google Play). We do not receive or store your payment card details. Payment processing is governed by the policies of the respective payment providers.
privacyConnect.usageText: The data we collect is used solely to create and maintain your account, provide and improve the VPN service, process subscriptions, and provide technical support.
privacyConnect.thirdPartyText: We do not sell or rent your personal data. We may disclose data only where required by law. Because we keep no activity logs, we have no traffic data about you that we could provide.
privacyConnect.retentionText: We retain account data for the duration of your subscription. When you delete your account, its associated data is deleted, except for information we are required to retain by law.
privacyConnect.securityText: All traffic within the VPN tunnel is encrypted using modern encryption protocols. We apply technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access.
privacyConnect.rightsText: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data at any time by contacting us using the details below.
privacyConnect.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date.
privacyConnect.contactText: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

terms.metaDescription: Public offer and terms of use for the Chattr service
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1Text: This document is a public offer (the "Offer") and sets out the terms of use for the Chattr app and the Chattr Pro subscription (the "Service"). By paying for a subscription or using the Service, you accept the terms of this Offer in full.
terms.s2Text: Chattr is a messenger that provides private and secure communication. The Chattr Pro subscription lets users support the app's development and gain access to additional features.
terms.s3Text: The Chattr Pro subscription is purchased on the website and paid for according to the selected plan. The subscription renews automatically unless cancelled by the user before the start of a new billing period.
terms.s4Text: Payment is made in Russian rubles (₽) using one of the methods offered on the website. The payment date is the day the funds are received. The subscription price is shown on the website before payment.
terms.s5Text: The subscription is activated automatically once payment is confirmed. The service is considered rendered from the moment access to subscription features is provided. The method of delivery is digital access through the Chattr website. Activation is instant after payment confirmation. There is no territorial restriction on where the service is provided.
terms.s6Item1: Use the Service only for lawful purposes.
terms.s6Item2: Not share access to their account with third parties.
terms.s6Item3: Not use the Service to distribute malware, spam, or other unlawful activity.
terms.s6Item4: Not attempt to disrupt the operation of the Service.
terms.s7Item1: Keep the Service operational in accordance with its stated description.
terms.s7Item2: Not store or analyze user data.
terms.s7Item3: Notify users of changes to the terms of use.
terms.s7Outro: The provider may suspend a user's access if the terms of this Offer are violated.
terms.s8TextBefore: Refund terms are set out in the
terms.s9Text: The Service is provided "as is". The provider does not warrant uninterrupted operation of the Service and is not liable for temporary outages caused by technical reasons or the actions of third parties. The provider is not responsible for actions taken by the user through the Service.
terms.s10Text: The provider may make changes to this Offer. The current version is always available on this page. Continued use of the Service after changes are published constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

refund.metaDescription: Refund terms for the Chattr subscription
refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.s1Text: This Refund Policy applies to the Chattr Pro subscription purchased on the Chattr website. By paying for a subscription, you agree to the terms set out below.
refund.s2Text: You may request a full refund within 14 (fourteen) calendar days of your first subscription payment if the service does not match its stated description or you have not used the service.
refund.s3Intro: Refunds are issued when the following conditions are met:
refund.s3Item1: The refund request is submitted within 14 days of the payment date.
refund.s3Item2: The subscription has not been actively used for more than 7 days.
refund.s3Item3: The account has not been blocked for violating the terms of use.
refund.s4Intro: Refunds are not issued in the following cases:
refund.s4Item1: More than 14 calendar days have passed since payment.
refund.s4Item2: The subscription has been actively used for more than 7 days.
refund.s4Item3: The terms of use have been violated.
refund.s4Item4: A refund has already been issued for this account.
refund.s5Text: The subscription renews automatically at the end of each paid period. You can cancel automatic renewal at any time before a new period begins. If the subscription was not cancelled before the charge, a refund for the current paid period is issued in accordance with the conditions above.
refund.s6TextBefore: To request a refund, send a message to
refund.s6TextAfter: stating the email address linked to your account and the reason for the refund. Requests are reviewed within up to 10 business days. Refunds are issued using the same method the payment was made with.

dataDeletion.metaDescription: How to delete your data from the Chattr app
dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion
dataDeletion.subtitle: You can delete your account and all related data at any time, without contacting us and without giving a reason.
dataDeletion.step1After: . All data is deleted instantly and permanently.
dataDeletion.step2Title: If you've lost access to your account
dataDeletion.step2After: . After verifying your identity, we'll delete the account manually, usually within 48 hours.
dataDeletion.remainText: No backups, metadata, or "anonymized" copies. Deletion is complete and final.

support.metaDescription: Get in touch with the Chattr team
support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Questions, suggestions, or something not working? Write to us. We read every message.
support.note: We usually reply within 48 hours. To help us help you faster, describe the problem in as much detail as possible and attach screenshots if you can.

pricing.metaDescription: Chattr Pro subscription. Support the development of Chattr.
pricing.title: Support Chattr
pricing.subtitle: Your subscription helps us build Chattr without investors or ads. Pick a plan — you can cancel anytime.
pricing.included1Text: Chattr is built without investors or ads. Your subscription lets us keep going.
pricing.included2Text: Your messages are handled first, directly by the development team.
pricing.included3Text: Your subscription renews itself. Cancel in one click under "Manage subscription".
pricing.noteBefore: Payment is made in Russian rubles through a secure payment gateway. Manage your subscription under

download.metaTitle: Download Chattr · For Windows and macOS
download.metaDescription: Download Chattr — a private VPN client for Windows and macOS. Automatic updates, secure connection.
download.platformMetaDescription: Download Chattr for {platform} with automatic updates.
download.tagline: Chattr for Windows and macOS. Secure connection. Automatic updates.
download.macReq: macOS 11 Big Sur or newer. Apple Silicon or Intel.
download.windowsReq: Windows 10 (64-bit) or newer. The installer will request administrator rights.
download.fineprint: The app updates automatically in the background. When a new version is released, you won't need to download the installer again — the update is applied on restart.

account.title: Manage subscription
account.subtitle: Manage your Chattr Pro subscription and linked card.
account.noSubscription: You don't have an active subscription.
account.autoRenewDisabledNotice: Auto-renewal disabled. Access remains until the end of the paid period.
account.yookassaNoUrl: YooKassa did not return a payment link
account.confirmCancelText: Auto-renewal will be turned off. Your subscription stays active until the end of the paid period, after which it won't renew.
account.confirmDeleteCardText: We'll unlink your card and turn off auto-renewal. You can set up a new payment again through the app.
